title: Never Moved, Always Strong

sections.label: Intro
lines: Generate a soft, subtle track with smooth transitions.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: As the mountains rise around Zion’s hill,
So the Lord surrounds His people still.
Unshaken by storms, unbowed by time,
In His love, we find our climb.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Those who trust in the Lord cannot be moved,
Like the hills that stand forever, steady and true.
Through the trials and valleys, His arms enfold,
Safe in the shadows of grace, steadfast and bold.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The wicked may reign, but not for long,
For justice will right what’s been done wrong.
A peace will come to the pure of heart,
His righteousness never departs.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Those who trust in the Lord cannot be moved,
Like the hills that stand forever, steady and true.
Through the trials and valleys, His arms enfold,
Safe in the shadows of grace, steadfast and bold.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Oh, guide us, Lord, to walk upright,
Keep our hearts with You in the light.
May we always know Your peace,
A mercy that will never cease.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Those who trust in the Lord cannot be moved,
Like the hills that stand forever, steady and true.
Through the trials and valleys, His arms enfold,
Safe in the shadows of grace, steadfast and bold.

sections.label: Outro
lines: (Avoid excessive brightness or reverb effects.)

epigraph: They that trust in the LORD shall be as mount Zion
